name: Brand Awareness
description: 42-day brand-building campaign arc focused on establishing market presence, trust, and audience connection from scratch.

phases.name: introduction
phases.label: Brand Introduction
phases.goal: Introduce who you are and what you stand for. Establish visual identity and brand voice across all channels. Reach new audiences.

spokeCadence.paidAds: Reach-optimized, brand video and carousel creative
spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: Identify and outreach to 5-8 aligned creators

themeBank: Meet the Team Behind the Brand

phases.name: storytelling
phases.label: Storytelling & Connection
phases.goal: Deepen emotional connection through stories, customer voices, and behind-the-scenes transparency. Build community engagement.

spokeCadence.emailBlasts: 2 total (day 18 story feature, day 25 community roundup)
spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: First wave of creator content published

themeBank: Behind the Scenes: A Day at Our HQ
Community Voices: What You Told Us

phases.name: authority
phases.label: Authority & Trust
phases.goal: Position as a category leader through data, expertise, and social proof. Drive press coverage and backlinks.

spokeCadence.socialPosts: 1-2 per day, data and insight driven
spokeCadence.emailBlasts: 2 total (day 30 industry report, day 36 press roundup)
spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: Second wave of creator content, thought-leader endorsements

themeBank: Expert Take: Our Point of View

phases.name: retention
phases.label: Community & Retention
phases.goal: Convert awareness into lasting relationships. Launch community initiatives, referral programs, and ongoing content series.

spokeCadence.emailBlasts: 1 total (day 40 — referral program launch or community invite)
